title: Phase 013 still marks final verification gates pending despite pass evidence

findingDetails.evidence: `tasks.md:88-91` leaves T023-T026 unchecked for TypeScript, requested vitest, strict validation, and comment hygiene, and `tasks.md:102` leaves the final completion criterion unchecked. `checklist.md:76-81` similarly leaves CHK-021/022/023 pending. But `implementation-summary.md:118-121` records PASS for `npx tsc --noEmit`, requested provenance/guard vitest, strict validation, and comment hygiene, and `review/review-report.md:29` independently records `tsc --noEmit: 0`, guard/provenance suite pass, `validate.sh --strict` 0/0, and comment hygiene clean.
findingDetails.why: The phase has conflicting completion sources: the summary/review say the final gates were run and passed, while plan/tasks/checklist still tell operators the final run is pending. This breaks traceability for the 022 regression being verified.
findingDetails.recommendation: Reconcile phase 013 docs: mark T023-T026 and the final completion criterion complete with the exact evidence already recorded, fill CHK-021/022/023/042, update the verification summary counts and stale `next_safe_action` fields, and ensure `plan.md:130` no longer says the final run is pending.

title: Phase 014 checklist still records pre-remediation 10-test evidence

findingDetails.evidence: `checklist.md:77` says the flag-on idempotency suite passed with `1 file, 10 tests`, and `checklist.md:81` repeats `1 file, 10 tests` for flag-off. However `implementation-summary.md:104` records the remediated flag-on run as `1 file passed, 12 tests passed`, and `review/review-report.md:37` states `12/12 (was 10; +won/lost-replay +flag-off)`.
findingDetails.why: The checklist still preserves the pre-remediation count for the flag-on suite, contradicting the explicit remediation evidence that corrected the count to 12/12. Operators checking checklist evidence will see the old count and cannot trace the regression fix cleanly.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update CHK-021 to the remediated 12/12 flag-on evidence, and either confirm CHK-023 is intentionally a separate historical 10-test flag-off run or update it to the current recorded evidence style; keep checklist and implementation-summary counts synchronized.
